step_rationale: Systemic iron-metabolism and oxidative-stress marker; associated with MACE risk.
mechanism: Ferritin is a systemic marker of oxidative stress and hemolysis associated with myocardial infarction risk and adverse outcomes.

references.title: Genetic insights into associations of multisite chronic pain with common diseases and biomarkers using data from the UK Biobank.
Inflammatory biomarkers and risk of cardiovascular events in patients undergoing coronary angiography.
